_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Ko dehan amigo, no tama.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan maka halo ba lingua hotu-hotu bele tama. Lingua ida-idak iha rekompensu tradusaun ida.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lista lingua no taxa Marks provisóriu. Marks token partisipasaun, la'ós asaun.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Tradus Liana Banyan ba {{language}}. Hetan {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Lian Fundadór: Tanba sa Liafuan sira ne'e
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Termu ida-idak iha plataforma ne'e iha razaun naran. Origem 26 naran importante.
speakFriend.step1Body: Abre Rekompensu Tradusaun hosi Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Tradus liña hotu-hotu presiza. Submete liu Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Depois akseita, simu Marks no rejista iha IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Dehan belun, halo fali."

languageSwitcher.tip: Uza senha lingua diferente iha Porta Durin atu loke esperiénsia úniku!
